Acme Corp Q3 2025 Financial Summary

Revenue: $4.2M (up 15% year-over-year)
Operating Expenses: $3.1M
Net Profit: $1.1M
Profit Margin: 26.2%

Headcount: 87 employees (added 12 in Q3)
Key Hires: VP of Engineering, Senior Data Scientist

Revenue Breakdown:
- Enterprise contracts: $2.8M
- SMB subscriptions: $1.0M
- Professional services: $0.4M

Notable wins: signed 3 Fortune 500 clients in September.
Churn rate decreased from 4.1% to 2.8%.
